stemHtml: According to OPS regulations terminology, a runway is considered damp when the runway surface is…

options.a: covered with water up to 3 mm deep.
options.b: covered with water up to 1 mm deep.
options.c: not dry, but when the moisture on it does not give it a shiny appearance.
options.d: not dry, but when there is sufficient moisture to cause it to appear reflective.
